metadata.name: ai.quickdeploy/google-news-rss
metadata.title: Google News RSS
metadata.description: Generated feed-2-mcp MCP manifest for Google News RSS.

notes: Official, unauthenticated, publicly reachable Google News top-stories RSS feed for the en-US/US edition (hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en). Verified live by direct fetch: valid RSS 2.0 document, root element <rss version="2.0">, containing top-story items with title, link, and source sub-elements.

No content digest is pinned: this is a live, continuously-updated feed (not a static document), so a fixed SHA-256 of the feed body would go stale immediately and would not meaningfully verify provenance. retrievedAt/sourceVersion record when and how the endpoint was verified instead.
The hl/gl/ceid query parameters select language/region/edition; en-US/US is the default edition pinned for this catalog entry.

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
